story.plain_language: 8-15 sentences in plain English, no legal jargon. Tell the story as if explaining to a non-lawyer.
story.legal_language: 5-10 sentences with full legal precision, proper terminology, and statutory references.
story.verification_note: Confirmed both versions are factually identical.

procedural_journey.what_was_decided: Brief description of what was decided at this stage

provisions_engaged.provision_id: Section XXX Act Name — Short Title

precedent_registry.case_name: Cited Case Name v. Other Party
precedent_registry.what_it_held: 2-3 sentences — ONLY what the current judgment says this case held. Do not add from your own knowledge.
precedent_registry.why_cited: Why the court cited this case

ratio_decidendi.label: Short descriptive label
ratio_decidendi.proposition: Universalized legal principle stated as a general rule, not case-specific.

obiter_dicta.observation: The court's observation that was not necessary for the decision
obiter_dicta.future_significance: How this observation might matter in future cases

operative_order.order_text: Verbatim or close paraphrase of what the court ordered

order_items.detail: Specific detail of what was ordered

items.label: Short label for this syllogism
items.major_premise: The legal rule (general principle or statutory provision)
items.minor_premise: The case-specific facts applied to the rule

syllogisms.chain_logic: Narrative description of how the syllogisms connect to produce the final conclusion.

interpretive_method.method_explanation: Explanation of why the judge chose this interpretive method

alternative_method_analysis.analysis_narrative: Step-by-step application of this alternative method to the same facts

interpretive_method.judges_tendency: Description of the judge's interpretive tendency based on this judgment

rhetorical_architecture.opening_move: How the judgment opens (e.g., sets out the question, narrates facts first, etc.)

hidden_assumptions.what_court_assumes: The unstated assumption the court relies on
hidden_assumptions.why_it_matters: Why this assumption is significant for the reasoning
hidden_assumptions.how_to_challenge: How an advocate could challenge this assumption

silent_arguments.the_argument: The argument that was never made but should have been

step_2_structural_validity.explanation: How this argument respects statutory hierarchy

step_3_adversarial_challenge.counter_argument: The strongest counter-argument against this silent argument

load_bearing_facts.fact: A fact that the reasoning critically depends on

decorative_facts.fact: A fact mentioned but not critical to the reasoning
decorative_facts.why_decorative: Why removing this fact would not change the outcome

ambiguous_facts.fact: A fact whose characterization is debatable
ambiguous_facts.why_ambiguous: Why this fact could be read differently

counterfactual_analysis.original_fact: The actual fact as stated in the judgment
counterfactual_analysis.altered_fact: What if this fact were different?
counterfactual_analysis.likely_new_outcome: What the outcome would likely be

alternative_interpretations.what_it_would_have_been: The alternative interpretation not chosen by the court
alternative_interpretations.why_not_adopted: Why the court rejected or did not consider this

doctrines.doctrine_name: Name of the doctrine at work
doctrines.how_it_manifests: How this doctrine operates in the judgment

tensions.supporting_sc_judgment: Case Name (Year) — at least one SC judgment endorsing the competing doctrine

sword_uses.scenario: Scenario where this judgment can be used offensively
sword_uses.draft_argument: 2-3 sentence draft argument with case name, citation, and ¶ number ready to use in court.

shield_uses.attack_being_faced: What attack this judgment defends against
shield_uses.how_judgment_helps: How citing this judgment helps defensively
shield_uses.key_factual_similarity: What facts MUST be true in your case for this shield to work
shield_uses.boundary_condition: Under what facts would this shield FAIL

vulnerabilities.weak_point: The specific weakness in this judgment
vulnerabilities.what_would_be_needed: What facts/arguments would be needed to succeed

stress_test.defence_response: How the other side would defend

vulnerability_map.durability_reasoning: Explanation of why this score was assigned

distinguishing_playbook.factual_difference: The key factual difference to exploit
distinguishing_playbook.draft_argument: Draft argument for distinguishing this judgment
distinguishing_playbook.validity_note: Why this distinction is material to the ratio

cross_domain_transplants.analogous_principle: The principle that can be transplanted

genome_summary.text: 5-8 sentences capturing: what the court held, what assumptions it made, where it is vulnerable, where the law is heading, and why this judgment matters. Minimum 200 characters.

cite_when: Condition 1 when you should cite this judgment
Condition 2 when you should cite this judgment
do_not_cite_when: Condition 1 when you should NOT cite this judgment
Condition 2 when you should NOT cite this judgment

killer_paragraph.text: The most powerful paragraph — verbatim from judgment

hidden_gem.text: An overlooked paragraph with untapped potential
hidden_gem.why_it_matters: Why practitioners should pay attention to this

questions_created.the_question: A new legal question this judgment creates or leaves open
questions_created.why_new: Why this question did not exist before this judgment
questions_created.who_will_raise_first: Who is most likely to raise this question

check_1_ratio_syllogism.detail: Every ratio in 1.6 traces to at least one syllogism in 2.1

check_2_operative_order.detail: Operative order in 1.8 is consistent with ratio in 1.6

check_3_dependency_tree.detail: Every syllogism conclusion in 2.1 appears as a node in 2.2

check_4_fact_sensitivity.detail: Every load-bearing fact in 3.3 links to specific syllogism(s) in 2.1

check_5_counterfactual.detail: Every counterfactual in 3.4 targets a real syllogism and a real fact
